summary_one_line: Input must carry valid OpenType FOURCC table tags (OTTO/morx/mort/GPOS) so hb_ot_layout_has_substitution drives the false branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The font blob must present recognizable OpenType structure: a valid sfnt magic ('OTTO' / 0x00010000) plus 4-byte table-directory tags such as 'morx', 'mort', 'GPOS' at the table-record offsets, so that hb_ot_layout_has_substitution(face) and apply_morx resolve to the configuration that takes line 154's false branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The vpc-discovered winner seeds embed exact FOURCC table tags: seed 1 has 'OTTO' magic at 0x00 and the ASCII tag 'morx' at 0x0c-0x0f; seed 2 has 'GPOS' at 0x0c-0x0f and 'mort' at 0x1c-0x1f. These literal 4-byte tags let the table-directory parser see a substitution/morx table and select the false-side branch (avg hitcount on the false side: winner=4).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The vp loser seeds carry no coherent table tags at those offsets (e.g. seed 1 begins 0xfe ff ff ff and the ASCII run 'y-hant-hk', seed 2 is 13 random-ish bytes); they never assemble the FOURCC magic+tag structure, so they stall on the true side (loser resolved=0/10, blocked=10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: Both involved fuzzers carry value_profile's distance-bucket comparison feedback; the ONLY difference is value_profile_cmplog's I2SRandReplace mutator. I2S extracts the 4-byte tag comparison operands from the CMP buffer (HB_TAG comparisons on 'morx'/'GPOS' etc.) and substitutes them verbatim at the matching input offset, planting the literal FOURCC tags that the loser's blind havoc plus distance-bucket feedback cannot synthesize. This is I2SRandReplace input-to-state substitution.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of a guard testing hb_ot_layout_has_substitution combined with apply_morx.
The globally blocked side is the false branch.
The winner seeds contain literal FOURCC table tags OTTO and morx.
The second winner seed contains the literal table tags GPOS and mort.
The loser seeds lack coherent table-tag structure and instead carry arbitrary bytes / unrelated ASCII.
The winner resolves the branch 8/10 trials while the loser is blocked all 10 trials.
The loser never resolves the branch in any of its 10 trials.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc plus token stack.
value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator on top of the same value_profile CMP_MAP feedback.
The winner takes the false side while the loser stays on the true side at line 154.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: T=0 F=2  T=18 F=0  bool has_gsub = !apply_morx && hb_ot_layout_has_substitut...  <-- BLOCKER

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5695 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed ae73a8c9233c3cb8` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -, ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6) at depth 18 of the 19-level ancestor chain, the floor signal characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gated on hb_ot_layout_has_substitution where value_profile resolves the false branch as often as value_profile_cmplog despite requiring exact 4-byte FOURCC table tags would refute the I2S attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact offsets at which the table-directory parser reads each FOURCC tag are inferred from seed ASCII rather than directly observed, so the precise byte-to-comparison mapping driving the false branch is assumed.
